.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(246, 247, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(225, 228, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(59, 166, 247, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(225, 228, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgba(59, 166, 247, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(246, 247, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #f6f7f9 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#f6f7f9, color-mix(in srgb, #f6f7f9 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #f6f7f9 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#f6f7f9, color-mix(in srgb, #f6f7f9 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(246, 247, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(246, 247, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(246, 247, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(225, 228, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(225, 228, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(59, 166, 247, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(246, 247, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(225, 228, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(80, 178, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(246, 247, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(246, 247, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(225, 228, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(225, 228, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre::before.background: rgb(183, 191, 205) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(225, 228, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js::before.background: rgb(183, 191, 205) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

svg.lucide-list.svg-icon.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
